storyCreator.title: Story Creator
storyCreator.noSettings: No technical data or map positions have been defined
storyCreator.introText: This tool is designed for creating interactive, map-based stories. After entering general information such as the name, description, author, and cover image, you can flexibly add individual chapters below. Using the buttons at the bottom of the page, you can preview, save, or discard the story.

labels.wrongFormat: Only image files (e.g. JPG, PNG) are permitted.
labels.emptyChapter: No chapters have been created yet.

chapter.infoText: This is where you define what will appear in the final story. The process involves two steps: First, you specify the map section, zoom level, feature data, and tools. Then, in the lower section, you can insert the corresponding text and media.
chapter.successAlert: The map position has been successfully saved!
chapter.positionChangedHint: The location does not match the current view of the map.
chapter.title: Enter chapter title
chapter.initialText: Click here to add a chapter description...
